How to Use RTG SolWatch
🏢 What is SolWatch?

SolWatch automatically scrapes solicitations from BidNet Direct, Bonfire, ESBD, CivCast, NTTA, and other Texas procurement portals. Each solicitation is scored for relevance to RTG’s civil engineering disciplines using keyword matching. The dashboard refreshes whenever a scrape is run.

⚡ KPI Cards (top bar)

Closing This Week — filters to urgent sols closing within 7 days (score ≥40).
High Relevance ≥80 — filters to the strongest matches.
All Open Solicitations — resets all filters and shows everything.

🎥 Filter Bar

Discipline — Narrows to sols that score above the relevance threshold for a specific discipline (Roadway, Drainage, Survey, etc.). The Score column updates to show the discipline-specific score.
New This Week — When active, hides all sols not posted this week. The green date highlight on Sol Posted is always shown regardless of this toggle.
Search — Filters by title, organization, county, city, or sol number.
Score ≥ — Minimum overall relevance score threshold.
Closes — Range slider to filter by days until closing.
Source / Org — Multi-select dropdowns with search to filter by platform or issuing organization.

📊 Table

Click any column header to sort ascending/descending. Click a row to open its detail panel on the right.
■ bright green = scraped today    ■ light green = scraped within 7 days
■ blue = currently selected row

📄 Detail Panel

Shows the full solicitation details: dates, location, estimated value, contact, description, relevance match reasons, and a per-discipline score breakdown. Click ✕ or the dimmed area to close. The panel scrolls independently from the table.

⬇️ Download CSV

Exports all open solicitations (not just the current filtered view) to a CSV file that opens in Excel. Includes all fields: sol number, title, org, scores, dates, contact, and description.
